title: Stanbic IBTC Boss Urges Youths To Imbibe Discipline & Dedication In Their Career Journey - FinancialEDGE
description: The chief executive officer of Stanbic IBTC Holdings Plc, Dr Demola Sogunle, has urged Nigerian youths to imbibe the culture of discipline and dedication in their career journey. Dr Sogunle disclosed this in his inspiring speech at the seventh edition of Stanbic IBTC Youth Leadership Series (YLS), with the theme "The Growth Code: Unlocking the
html: The chief executive officer of Stanbic IBTC Holdings Plc, Dr Demola Sogunle, has urged Nigerian youths to imbibe the culture of discipline and dedication in their career journey.
